group.description: The group assigned to the user.

user.description: The RBAC user associated with the group.

x-speakeasy-transform-from-api.jq:
.
| if .group != null and .group.id != null then . + { group_id: .group.id } else . end
| if .user != null and .user.id != null then . + { user_id: .user.id } else . end
| del(.group, .user)

x-speakeasy-transform-to-api.jq:
.
| if .group_id != null then .group = { id: .group_id } else . end
| if .user_id != null then .user = { id: .user_id } else . end
| del(.group_id, .user_id)
